consent.title: Privacy preferences
consent.body: We use essential cookies to run PDFTrusted. With your permission, we may use optional cookies for analytics and partner-sponsored placements that help keep core tools free.
consent.essentialDesc: Required for sign-in, security, and basic site function.
consent.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand usage and improve reliability (aggregated where possible).
consent.advertisingDesc: Allows discreet partner ads on select public pages. Never used inside document processing.
consent.preferencesDesc: Remembers UI choices such as theme or dismissed notices.
consent.ccpaNotice: California residents may limit optional sharing via Essential only or browser controls.

monetization.policyNote: Partner placements may appear on select informational pages. Processing tools stay ad-free while you work.

privacyCenter.seoTitle: Privacy Center — Local PDF Processing | PDFTrusted
privacyCenter.seoDesc: Learn how PDFTrusted combines browser-first privacy with optional encrypted cloud processing and automatic file cleanup.
privacyCenter.title: Privacy Center
privacyCenter.intro: PDFTrusted is built for hybrid processing. Core tools run in your browser by default. Large workflows, OCR, AI, and advanced conversions may use temporary encrypted cloud staging that is deleted automatically — never sold or used for training.

local.title: Local processing
local.desc: Merge, split, compress, and many edits run in your browser using WebAssembly and client-side libraries — no upload required.

noUpload.title: Browser-first by default
noUpload.desc: Core tools run in your browser. Optional Premium cloud uploads are encrypted and auto-deleted within 24 hours.

browser.title: You stay in control
browser.desc: Close the tab and your session data is gone unless you explicitly save locally.

cleanup.title: Automatic cleanup
cleanup.desc: Workspace history is optional and stored only in this browser — clear it anytime.

privacyCenter.footer: For legal details, cookies, and data handling policies, read our full privacy policy.
privacyCenter.retentionBody: Browser-based tools process files locally in your session. When you use cloud processing, uploads and outputs are kept only as long as needed to complete the job and are removed automatically per our cleanup policy—not sold or used to train AI models. Download results promptly.
privacyCenter.rightsBody: You can limit optional cookies via Cookie settings in the footer (when analytics or ads are enabled). To request access, correction, or deletion of account data, email support@pdftrusted.com from the address used at sign-in. We aim to respond within 30 days. Self-service account deletion is not yet available in the app.

securityPage.seoDesc: HTTPS, browser-side processing for core tools, optional encrypted cloud with automatic deletion, and no personal PDF library.
securityPage.title: Security
securityPage.intro: PDFTrusted is built for everyday PDF work with clear boundaries: most tools run in your browser; optional Premium cloud jobs use HTTPS, isolated workers, and automatic file cleanup within 24 hours.

https.title: HTTPS everywhere
https.desc: The site and API are served over encrypted connections (TLS).

local.title: Browser-first core tools
local.desc: Merge, split, compress, and many edits run locally in your browser without uploading file contents for conversion logic.

nostorage.title: No PDF drive
nostorage.desc: We do not offer cloud storage for your documents. Cloud uploads are temporary processing inputs only.

sandbox.title: Browser sandbox
sandbox.desc: Client-side tools run inside your browser’s security model, separate from other sites you visit.

cloud.title: Optional secure cloud
cloud.desc: Premium jobs (OCR, PDF to Word, stronger compression) run on dedicated workers. Files are auto-deleted; we do not use your PDF text for ads or model training.

home.seoTitle: Secure Online PDF Tools — Merge, Convert & Edit | PDFTrusted

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Straight answers about privacy, cloud processing, and limits.

privacy.a: Browser tools often never upload your file. Cloud jobs use temporary storage that is deleted per our retention policy—not sold or used for AI training.

cloud.a: Turbo Cloud runs OCR, PDF to Word, heavy compression, and AI on secure workers after an encrypted upload. Staging files auto-delete; usage scales with what you run.

ocr.a: Accuracy depends on scan quality, contrast, and language. Clean, straight scans usually work best.

account.a: No — merge, compress, split, sign, and edit work without signup. Sign in when you want Turbo Cloud, AI tools, or saved job history.

ai.a: AI tools use advanced language models to analyze your document content. Small files use efficient free models for speed; larger or complex documents use premium models for better accuracy.

limits.q: What are the file size limits?
limits.a: Browser tools adapt to your device for stability. Turbo Cloud accepts larger files when signed in. Each tool page shows current caps for your session.

modes.title: Private Local or Turbo Cloud — automatic optimization
modes.subtitle: Lightweight PDF tasks stay in your browser. Heavy files, OCR, AI, and advanced conversions run on secure cloud workers with auto-delete staging.
modes.cloudTag: Sign in · Large files · AI quality
modes.pricingNote: Premium unlocks 500MB uploads, expanded credits, and priority cloud processing.

browser.free: Free for everyday merge, split, and edit
browser.instant: Instant — no server queue for supported tools
browser.unlimited: Unlimited browser runs on core tools
browser.local: Files stay on this device — zero cloud upload

cloud.large: Large PDFs without browser memory crashes

why.title: A modern PDF workspace — browser privacy plus cloud power
why.p1: PDFTrusted is a hybrid PDF platform for real document work: homework packets, contracts, tax forms, and client deliverables. Merge, compress, convert, sign, OCR, translate, and summarize without installing desktop software.
why.p2: Choose Private Local when files should never leave your device, or Turbo Cloud when you need Ghostscript compression, OCR, translation, or AI on heavy documents. Low-end phones and tablets can still process large files via cloud-assisted workflows. Encrypted staging auto-expires; signed-in users get 10 monthly credits.
why.p3: From Chat with PDF and AI Summarize to merge, compress, and e-sign, PDFTrusted replaces a cluttered toolbox with one fast, mobile-ready experience. No account required to start — sign in when you want cloud credits, job history, and Premium limits.
why.trust1Desc: Zero-upload browser processing when you choose it
why.trust2Desc: Large files, OCR, translate & summarize on secure workers
why.trust3Desc: iPhone, Android & low-memory devices — cloud assist when needed

heroTitle: Secure online PDF tools for everyday and heavy workflows

toolPage.securityBadge: Browser-first by default. Turbo Cloud uses encrypted staging that auto-purges after delivery.
toolPage.secureFast: {{tool}} runs in your browser when file size allows. Large or advanced jobs may use temporary encrypted cloud staging that is deleted automatically.

toolPage.comingSoonNotify: This tool is not available yet. Try one of our live tools below.
toolPage.processingDone: Processing complete. Download your output or continue editing.
toolPage.aboutBody: {{tool}} is a PDFTrusted tool for fast browser-based processing. Files stay in your browser when possible; temporary staging is purged automatically.

toolPage.faqBatchYes: Yes — this tool supports batch uploads and can package outputs into a ZIP if needed.
toolPage.faqBatchNo: This tool accepts one file at a time.
toolPage.faqStoreA: When possible, processing stays in your browser. If a large file is temporarily staged on our servers, that copy is purged automatically within 24 hours.
toolPage.faqFailA: Use the Report an Issue button and contact our support team. We will help you resolve the problem quickly.
toolPage.singleFileError: This tool only supports one file at a time. Please upload a single file.
toolPage.conversionStructureComplex: File structure too complex — try simplifying the workbook or PDF, or re-export from Excel.
toolPage.conversionNoContent: No usable content was found in this file.
toolPage.conversionEncrypted: This file appears encrypted or password-protected. Unlock it first.
toolPage.conversionUnsupported: This format is not supported for this conversion.
toolPage.conversionFailed: Conversion failed. Please try another file.

trustShield.privacyDesc: Merge runs in your browser for supported workflows. Cloud staging is not used for standard merge. Bulk merge up to 50 files in-browser.
trustShield.privacyNoticeBody: Your files stay in browser memory. We do not upload PDFs for processing unless you turn off Privacy-First mode below.
trustShield.noPermanentStorage: PDFTrusted does not permanently store your documents. Browser memory is cleared when you close the tab; any optional cloud staging auto-expires within 24 hours.
trustShield.mergeBulkTitle: Privacy-First merge — up to {{max}} PDFs in your browser
trustShield.mergeBulkBody: Files stay in RAM only; cloud staging is off. Add PDFs in order, then merge — no upload to our servers.

protectPdf.aesNote: Downloads a PDFTrusted AES-encrypted package (.pdftrusted), not an Adobe Acrobat open-password PDF. Keep your password safe — it cannot be recovered.

hardLock.toggleHint: Power feature — flatten to an immutable image-only PDF before download.
hardLock.confirmBody: If you proceed, this PDF will be permanently flattened. Text and signatures will no longer be editable in standard PDF editors. This is intended for final, non-editable copies of important documents.

toolTrustStrip.noLogin: No account required for free tools

toolTrustStrip.retention: Temporary cloud staging auto-expires within 24 hours

aboutPage.title: The Future of Documents is AI-Powered
aboutPage.visionH1: Redefining Document Intelligence for a Privacy-First Future.
aboutPage.subtitle: Innovation meets privacy — PDFTrusted is a neural document intelligence platform, not just another PDF utility.
aboutPage.missionBody: At PDFTrusted, our mission is to democratize advanced document processing. We believe professional-grade AI tools should stay accessible and privacy-conscious. We are building an independent, browser-first PDF and AI platform—many tools run locally on your device; optional encrypted cloud handles heavy jobs with automatic cleanup.
aboutPage.whyExistBody: Traditional PDF tools are heavy, expensive, and outdated. We engineered PDFTrusted to be 'Neural-Native'—integrating cutting-edge AI directly into your browser. Whether it's 90% compression or instant AI-powered summaries, we provide the speed of a native app with the accessibility of the web.

privacy.title: Privacy by design
privacy.desc: Browser tools keep files on your device when possible. Cloud jobs use encrypted transfer and automatic deletion—not sold for ads or training.

ai.title: AI-Driven Innovation
ai.desc: Beyond simple editing—we offer document intelligence.

access.title: Universal Accessibility
access.desc: From students to CEOs, our One-Click philosophy ensures anyone can master their documents instantly.

aboutPage.foundersNote: We built PDFTrusted because document work should feel effortless — and private. Thank you for trusting us with yours.

seo.title: Founder's Mission | The Tech Behind PDFTrusted
seo.description: Discover how PDFTrusted is redefining document intelligence. Learn about our browser-native AI, ultra-compression technology, and our mission for a private web.
seo.keywords: AI PDF architect, browser-native PDF processing, private PDF compression technology, PDFTrusted founder

founder.name: PDFTrusted Founder
founder.title: Founder & Lead Architect
founder.problemStory: I was tired of expensive subscriptions and PDF tools that upload every file by default. I built PDFTrusted as an independent project: professional AI PDF tools with browser-first processing when your device can handle the job, and optional encrypted cloud only when you need OCR, AI, or heavy conversion.
founder.visionBody: I engineered PDFTrusted to give users clearer control: browser-first workflows when possible, transparent labels when cloud is required, and policies that describe retention—not vague marketing promises.
founder.missionHeadline: A Personal Mission for Privacy and Speed.
founder.missionBody: I built PDFTrusted because 'free' tools often hide uploads in the fine print. I focused on browser-first architecture for everyday PDF work, with optional Turbo Cloud clearly labeled for jobs that need server power—encrypted staging and automatic purge per our retention practices.

trust.human: Every line of code is written with a focus on speed and user privacy. PDFTrusted isn't owned by a giant corporation; it's a labor of love for the global community.
trust.transparency: I believe in 100% transparency. That's why I've engineered the tools to work without mandatory sign-ups.
trust.expertise: Built with Neural-Native AI and WASM — world-class document intelligence from a solo developer who puts privacy first.

founder.compressionTitle: How we achieve up to 90% Compression (Without losing quality).
founder.compressionBody: People ask, 'Is it too good to be true?' Here is the reality: Most tools use generic compression. PDFTrusted uses a proprietary Neural-Optimization algorithm. It identifies redundant data and optimizes font-embedding and image-vectors at a deep level. The result? Files that are up to 90% smaller* but look identical to the original.
founder.compressionDisclaimer: *Compression ratio depends on the original file's structure and content.

ingest.title: Local Ingest
ingest.desc: Documents are loaded into a secure, sandboxed browser environment. Files are processed locally using WASM technology, ensuring zero-latency and maximum privacy.

optimize.title: Neural Optimization
optimize.desc: Our proprietary algorithms identify and eliminate data redundancies. Note: Compression ratios up to 90% are achievable depending on source file structure, font embedding, and metadata density.

purge.title: Instant Purge
purge.desc: Once browser processing completes, temporary session data is cleared from memory. We do not keep a personal PDF library on our servers for casual tool use.

founder.technicalDisclaimer: Performance metrics are based on internal benchmarks; actual results may vary per user environment.
founder.promise: My promise to you: Browser tools stay private on your device, Turbo Cloud is optional and auto-purges — and core tools remain free.
founder.note: Every line of code in PDFTrusted was written with a single goal: to give you Adobe-level power for free. I am not a giant corporation; I am a developer dedicated to making the internet safer and faster for everyone. Thank you for trusting my work.
founder.connectDesc: Real person. Real support. Reach out anytime.

aboutPage.story:
PDFTrusted was built for a world where documents are analyzed, summarized, and transformed by AI — while keeping processing paths transparent.

Our platform combines browser-based tools with optional Trusted Cloud for workloads that need server-grade OCR or conversion. When cloud is used, files are transferred over HTTPS (TLS), staged temporarily, and removed per our automated cleanup policy—not sold or used to train public models on your uploads.

We do not sell your data. See our Privacy Policy and Privacy Center for details.
aboutPage.motto: You own your documents. We provide the intelligence.
aboutPage.p1: PDFTrusted is an AI-native document platform at https://pdftrusted.com — merge, compress, convert, edit, sign, OCR, summarize, and chat with PDFs.
aboutPage.p2: Contextual AI PDF analysis is available across the toolkit. Browser mode keeps files local; cloud mode is explicit, labeled, and optional.
aboutPage.whyDesc: Semantic search, LLM crawlers, and human users all see the same story: browser-first privacy, advanced AI when you need it, and transparent handling before you click Process.

cards.secureDesc: On-device AI processing where possible. Cloud jobs use 256-bit transit encryption and instant-purge protocols.
cards.privacyDesc: Contextual AI PDF analysis, summarize, chat, and OCR — engineered for speed without treating your files as training data.
cards.availableDesc: Use PDFTrusted on modern browsers across desktop and mobile.

highlights.noStorageDesc: We do not operate a “cloud drive” for your uploads. Files are used for processing and cleared from active memory when your task finishes.
highlights.freeDesc: We keep the essential toolkit approachable and clearly labeled so you know what each tool does.
highlights.clientDesc: Many workflows complete entirely on your device; server features are limited to what the tool requires (for example, authentication or large uploads when enabled).

faq.safeA: Core tools run in your browser over HTTPS. If you choose Premium cloud, files are uploaded only for that job, processed on secure workers, and auto-deleted within 24 hours. Review outputs before sharing sensitive documents.
faq.storeA: We do not keep a personal PDF library. Browser jobs clear when you close the tab. Cloud jobs use temporary storage that is purged on a schedule (typically within 24 hours).
faq.freeA: Yes — core browser tools are free. Premium cloud includes 2 free signed-in jobs per day on eligible tools; paid plans may expand limits when billing is enabled.

contactPage.responseTimeDesc: Most messages are answered within 24 hours.
contactPage.premiumSupportDesc: Premium members receive expedited help and extra processing limits.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: How PDFTrusted at https://pdftrusted.com handles your information — including optional Google sign-in — and how we protect your trust.

sections.privacyFirstDesc: PDFTrusted is designed so everyday PDF work stays on your device whenever the selected tool allows it. This policy explains what we do when you browse the site, when you optionally authenticate, and how third-party infrastructure fits in.
sections.clientDesc: Many tools process files directly in your browser. In those cases, the contents of your PDF are not sent to our application servers for conversion logic. You should still avoid processing highly sensitive documents on shared or untrusted devices.
sections.storageDesc: We do not operate a consumer cloud storage product for your PDFs. Outputs are generated for you to download; we do not keep a personal document archive tied to casual site use.
sections.secureItem1: We use HTTPS for the public site at https://pdftrusted.com.
sections.secureItem2: Core tools do not require an account. If you choose Google sign-in, only the profile data described below is used.
sections.secureItem3: Infrastructure providers may process network signals (for example IP metadata) as part of delivering the service; see “Hosting & sessions”.
sections.googleOAuthIntro: If you choose “Sign in with Google,” authentication is handled by Google and by Auth.js (JWT sessions) on our side. We use this flow only to recognize your account on PDFTrusted — not to read the contents of your Google Drive or Gmail.
sections.googleOAuthItem1: Data received from Google typically includes a stable subject identifier, email address, and name as permitted by your Google account settings.
sections.googleOAuthItem2: We store this sign-in information only insofar as needed to maintain your session (for example inside signed session cookies / JWT claims such as user id, email, and display name).
sections.googleOAuthItem3: Google’s processing of your credentials is governed by Google’s policies; please review Google Account security and privacy controls separately.
sections.googleOAuthItem4: You can stop using Google sign-in at any time by signing out and, if you wish, revoking PDFTrusted’s access from your Google account settings.
sections.googleOAuthItem5: We do not sell your Google profile data and we do not use your PDF file contents for advertising personalization.
sections.hostingDesc: The website and API are served from Cloudflare’s globally distributed network (“the edge”). Static pages (such as this Privacy Policy) are pre-built files without a traditional SQL database dependency. Session cookies issued for authentication are HTTP-only and scoped for secure use with our origin. If you use email/password registration where offered, minimal account records may be stored in Cloudflare R2 as small encrypted or hashed artifacts — not mixed with your PDF processing buffers.
sections.advertisingDesc: With your permission, we may load scripts from advertising partners (such as Google AdSense) on select public pages. Partners may use cookies or similar identifiers to measure delivery. We do not pass your PDF contents to advertisers. You can accept or reject optional categories via Cookie settings in the footer; essential cookies remain required for security and sign-in.
sections.subprocessorsDesc: Depending on features you use, limited technical data or temporary files may be processed by infrastructure partners under their own terms, including: Cloudflare (CDN, R2 object storage, Workers where configured), Vercel (application hosting), PayPal (payments), Google (optional OAuth sign-in and optional advertising/analytics when enabled), Supabase or similar auth/database providers where configured, Railway or other worker hosts for cloud PDF/AI jobs, and AI model providers (e.g. via OpenRouter or direct APIs) for OCR, translation, chat, and summarization. We do not sell your PDF contents to these providers for advertising.
sections.rightsDesc: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict certain processing of personal data. Email support@pdftrusted.com with the subject “Privacy request” and the account email you used. We will verify ownership before acting on deletion requests. Automated in-app account deletion is not yet available.
sections.contactPrivacyDesc: Questions about this policy: support@pdftrusted.com. Please include enough detail for us to help, without attaching confidential documents unless we explicitly request them.

faq.storeA: We do not provide a personal PDF hosting product. For typical browser tools, files are used transiently for processing and are not kept as an ongoing library on our servers.
faq.collectA: Beyond standard web telemetry that hosting and analytics partners may collect (such as IP-derived data, user agent, and security logs), we only receive personal identifiers when you authenticate. With Google OAuth we may process your Google user id, email, and name to maintain your session. We do not use your document text to build user profiles.
faq.adsQ: Will sponsored placements affect my privacy?
faq.adsA: Optional advertising partners (such as Google AdSense) may use cookies on pages where you have given consent. They do not receive your PDF contents for targeting. Browser-based tools keep file processing separate from ad delivery.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.subtitle: User-first legal terms for PDFTrusted — you own your data; we never sell it.

sections.usingDesc: PDFTrusted provides AI-native document tools for lawful personal and business use. You retain ownership of your documents. We process files only to deliver the service you request — we do not sell document contents or use them to train third-party AI models. Core tools run in your browser; optional cloud processing uses encrypted transit and automated purge schedules.
sections.responsibilityDesc: You are solely responsible for the legality of the documents you process and for obtaining any necessary rights from third parties. Do not use PDFTrusted to violate copyright, export controls, privacy laws, or any applicable regulation.
sections.availabilityDesc: We strive to keep the service online but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Features may change, rotate, or be retired as we improve the product. The canonical public site is https://pdftrusted.com; www.pdftrusted.com may redirect to this origin.
sections.thirdPartyDesc: PDFTrusted relies on vendors such as Cloudflare (network and object storage where configured), Google (optional OAuth sign-in and advertising where enabled), and analytics or error-reporting tools you can control via browser settings. Those vendors process limited technical data under their own terms.
sections.accountsDesc: Some features may require authentication. If you create a credential-based account where offered, you are responsible for safeguarding your password. If you use Google OAuth, your use of Google’s login service remains subject to Google’s terms. You must provide accurate information and notify us if you become aware of unauthorized account use.
sections.paymentsDesc: Optional paid subscriptions and one-time purchases for PDFTrusted Premium are described on our Pricing page at https://www.pdftrusted.com/pricing. Checkout and recurring billing are processed by PayPal (subscriptions and one-time payments). By purchasing, you agree to PayPal’s terms in addition to these Terms. All prices are shown in U.S. dollars (USD). Taxes may apply based on your location. You can manage or cancel PayPal subscriptions from your PayPal account or the receipt email PayPal sends after purchase. Refunds are handled according to our Refund Policy at https://www.pdftrusted.com/refund-policy.
sections.serviceHostDesc: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED “AS IS” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT RESULTS WILL BE ERROR-FREE OR SUITABLE FOR LEGAL, MEDICAL, OR REGULATED USE CASES.
sections.liabilityDesc: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, PDFTRUSTED AND ITS OPERATORS WILL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES, OR FOR LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR GOODWILL, ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH YOUR USE OF THE SITE. OUR AGGREGATE LIABILITY FOR ANY CLAIM RELATING TO THE SERVICE WILL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF (A) THE AMOUNTS YOU PAID US IN THE TWELVE MONTHS BEFORE THE CLAIM OR (B) FIFTY U.S. DOLLARS (US$50) IF YOU HAVE NOT PAID US.

faq.freeA: Yes. Core PDF tools are available for free. We offer a transparent service with no hidden costs for basic document processing.
faq.uploadA: Avoid uploading highly sensitive or confidential documents if you are concerned about privacy. Although PDFTrusted protects files locally, you should always use best judgment for sensitive content.
faq.businessQ: Can I use PDFTrusted for business documents?
faq.businessA: Yes. PDFTrusted is designed for both personal and professional use, but it is not a substitute for specialized enterprise-grade document management systems.

refundPage.title: Refund Policy
refundPage.subtitle: How refunds work for PDFTrusted Premium purchases processed by PayPal at https://www.pdftrusted.com.

sections.overviewDesc: We want you to be satisfied with PDFTrusted Premium. Because we deliver digital services and cloud processing capacity, refunds are limited to the cases below. This policy applies to purchases made through our official site and billed through PayPal.
sections.eligibilityTitle: When you may receive a refund
sections.eligibility1: You contact us within 14 days of purchase and have not substantially consumed paid cloud or AI quota.
sections.eligibility2: A technical failure on our side prevented delivery of the paid feature and we cannot resolve it within a reasonable time.
sections.eligibility3: You were charged in error (duplicate charge or wrong plan) and notify us promptly.
sections.nonRefund1: You changed your mind after using Premium cloud or AI features beyond a minimal test.
sections.nonRefund2: Issues caused by unsupported files, local browser limits, or third-party network blocks outside our control.
sections.nonRefund3: Subscriptions after the 14-day window except where required by applicable consumer law.
sections.processDesc: Email support@pdftrusted.com from the address used at checkout with your PayPal receipt or transaction ID.
sections.process1: Describe the issue and the tool or plan purchased.
sections.process2: We review requests within 5 business days.
sections.process3: Approved refunds are issued through PayPal to your original payment method.
sections.paypalDesc: PayPal processes subscription and one-time payments on our behalf. PayPal’s buyer terms apply at checkout. If PayPal approves a chargeback or refund under its policies, we will honor that outcome.

faq.howA: After approval, PayPal typically posts refunds within 5–10 business days depending on your bank or card issuer.
faq.trialQ: What about the free AI trial?
faq.trialA: The one-time AI Plus trial is free and not billed. This policy applies to paid Premium subscriptions only.
faq.paypalQ: Can I dispute a charge with my bank?
faq.paypalA: You may, but please email us first so we can resolve billing issues faster than a chargeback.

cookiePage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePage.subtitle: How PDFTrusted at https://pdftrusted.com uses cookies and similar technologies, including when ads are shown.

sections.overviewDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device by your browser. They help the site remember preferences, keep sessions secure where applicable, and measure basic usage. You can delete or block cookies through your browser settings.
sections.essentialDesc: We use strictly necessary cookies and similar storage for security, load balancing, language preference, and to keep the Progressive Web App experience working after you install PDFTrusted to your home screen.
sections.functionalDesc: We may store non-sensitive preferences locally (for example UI state or dismissed banners) so the site feels faster on repeat visits. This data stays on your device unless you clear site data.
sections.adsDesc: If you opt in, trusted partners may set cookies to deliver and measure discreet ads on select public pages (for example Google AdSense). We configure placements away from upload and processing flows. Your PDF bytes are not sold to advertisers.
sections.contactDesc: For privacy-related questions, see our Privacy Policy or contact support@pdftrusted.com.

faq.whatQ: Do I have to accept cookies to use PDF tools?
faq.whatA: Core tools work without optional marketing cookies. Essential cookies or local storage may still be needed for basic site function and security.
faq.adsQ: How do ad cookies relate to my documents?
faq.adsA: Ad systems operate separately from PDF processing. Your document bytes are not sold to advertisers as part of our product design.
faq.controlA: Use your browser’s privacy settings to block third-party cookies, clear site data, or use private browsing when working with sensitive files.

disclaimerPage.title: Disclaimer
disclaimerPage.subtitle: Important limitations on liability and use of PDFTrusted at https://pdftrusted.com.

sections.generalDesc: PDFTrusted provides software utilities for convenience. Output quality, layout fidelity, and compatibility may vary by file, browser, and device. You remain responsible for verifying results before relying on them.
sections.noWarrantyDesc: Nothing on this site constitutes legal, financial, medical, or regulatory advice. Do not use PDFTrusted as the sole basis for compliance decisions without independent review.
sections.thirdPartyDesc: Optional integrations (such as authentication providers, analytics, or advertising networks) are governed by their respective terms. PDFTrusted is not responsible for third-party outages or policy changes.
sections.limitationDesc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, PDFTrusted disclaims liability for any damages arising from use or inability to use the service, including data loss, business interruption, or errors in processed documents.

faq.accuracyQ: Will my PDF always look identical after processing?
faq.accuracyA: We aim for high fidelity, but complex PDFs (fonts, forms, layers, encryption) may render differently across browsers. Always review the output.
faq.legalQ: Can I use outputs in court or contracts?
faq.legalA: You should consult a qualified professional. PDFTrusted does not warrant outputs for legal evidentiary purposes.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Quick answers about PDFTrusted — free tools, privacy, file sizes, and ads.
faqPage.intro: Browse the questions below for the most common topics. For legal terms, see Terms of Service; for data practices, see Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.

items.freeA: Yes. Core PDF utilities are free to use in the browser. We may show ads to support hosting and development.
items.loginA: No account is required for standard tools. Optional sign-in may exist for certain features, but the public toolkit is designed to work without registration.
items.sizeQ: What is the maximum file size?
items.sizeA: Files up to 20MB are typically processed directly in your browser. Larger files up to 50MB may use secure cloud staging with automatic cleanup. Files over 50MB are not accepted — compress and try again.
items.storageQ: How long are my files kept?
items.storageA: Browser processing clears from memory when you finish or close the tab. Any temporary cloud staging objects are purged on a schedule (typically within 24 hours).
items.adsA: Ads help keep the service free. Ad delivery is handled by Google when AdSense is enabled and is separate from your PDF processing pipeline.
items.mobileA: Yes. Use a modern mobile browser. You can also add PDFTrusted to your home screen as a Progressive Web App for faster access.

howToUsePage.title: How to use PDFTrusted
howToUsePage.subtitle: Neural document processing in three steps — browser-first privacy, optional Trusted Cloud for advanced AI.
howToUsePage.step1Desc: Open any tool from the home grid or search. Drag and drop or tap to select. Pro-Tip: Start with Merge or Compress for instant browser-side results.
howToUsePage.step2Desc: Browser: privacy-preserving computation on your device. Cloud: contextual AI PDF analysis with 256-bit encrypted transit. Pro-Tip: Use AI Summarize to turn 100-page reports into 5-point bullets in seconds.
howToUsePage.step3Desc: Save results locally. Cloud outputs auto-expire — download promptly. Pro-Tip: Chain tools from the Related Tools strip without returning home.
howToUsePage.step4Desc: Add PDFTrusted to your home screen for a native app experience on iOS, Android, or desktop.
howToUsePage.toolsIntro: Every tool below supports browser-first processing where technically feasible.
howToUsePage.proTip1: AI Summarize: Turn lengthy reports into executive bullet points in seconds.
howToUsePage.proTip2: Compress: Advanced algorithms may reduce file size by up to 90%* while preserving visual integrity.
howToUsePage.proTip3: Chat with PDF: Ask questions across entire documents with contextual AI analysis.
howToUsePage.proTip4: Translate: Neural processing supports 50+ languages with privacy-first defaults.

scanner.seoDesc: Online scanner for receipts and documents: auto-enhance brightness & contrast, perspective crop, and portrait-ready exports. Browser-based processing with OpenCV-style algorithms — no uploads.
scanner.heroSubtitle: Free, secure photo-to-scan pipeline — perspective correction and enhancement run locally on your device.
scanner.dropLabel: Drop a photo of your document
scanner.dropSub: JPG, PNG, or WebP — processed locally on your device
scanner.resultPlaceholder: Run the scanner to preview output.
scanner.statusFootnote: Includes at least {{seconds}} seconds of visible progress for a consistent experience across PDFTrusted tools.
scanner.faq1: Photos stay on your device — detection and enhancement run entirely in your browser (OpenCV.js + Canvas).
scanner.faq2: Perspective correction finds document edges when possible; otherwise you still get enhancement on the full photo.
scanner.faq3: Portrait mode rotates wide captures for comfortable mobile reading; combine with our PDF editor for the fastest PDF workflow.

errors.generic: Could not process this image. Try another photo or disable perspective correction.

pdfEditor.uploadDrop: Drop your PDF to start editing
pdfEditor.uploadSublabel: Add text, draw, merge pages, compress, and annotate — privately in your browser.

contentModal.title: Content edit
contentModal.hint: A white mask covers the original text span; replacement text is drawn on top when you export.

pdfEditor.contentHitHint: Double-click text to edit or replace

rearrangeModal.title: Rearrange pages
rearrangeModal.desc: Drag and drop thumbnails to reorder. The full document can be exported with the rearranged order.

signPro.title: Sign Pro
signPro.drawHint: Strokes use smooth quadratic curves and export at sharp resolution when possible.
signPro.padHint: Draw smoothly — like pen on notepad. Export captures your strokes at full resolution.
signPro.uploadLabel: Drop or choose a signature scan
signPro.uploadSub: Automatically removes pale paper tones for transparency.

signPdf.step1: Upload your PDF, then tap Add signature.
signPdf.step2: Draw, type a script signature, or upload a photo (we lighten typical paper backgrounds).
signPdf.step3: Drag and resize on the page, then download a flattened PDF with PDFTrusted Core.
signPdf.waitForPageLoad: Wait until the page finishes loading, then add your signature.
signPdf.addedSuccess: Signature placed on the page — drag to move or resize.
signPdf.addFailed: Could not add signature. Try again.
signPdf.drawTooSmall: Draw a larger signature, then tap Add to document.
signPdf.exportMissingDim: Open page {{page}} in the viewer before downloading so we can align signatures correctly.

pwaInstall.modalPickPlatform: Choose your device to install PDFTrusted.
pwaInstall.iosIntro: On iPhone, add this site to your Home Screen for an app-like experience (no APK required).
pwaInstall.iosStep1: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar (square with arrow).
pwaInstall.iosStep2: Scroll and tap Add to Home Screen.
pwaInstall.iosStep3: Confirm the name, then tap Add.
pwaInstall.iosStep4: Open PDFTrusted from your Home Screen anytime — it runs in full screen like a native app.
pwaInstall.fallbackIntro: Install PDFTrusted as an app for faster access and a fullscreen toolbar-free layout.
pwaInstall.androidChromeHint: Chrome / Edge (Android): open the browser menu (⋮) and choose Install app or Add to Home screen when offered.
pwaInstall.desktopHint: Desktop Chrome: look for the install icon in the address bar, or use Menu → Save and share → Install PDFTrusted.
pwaInstall.bannerTitle: Install PDFTrusted — fast access like a native app
pwaInstall.bannerDesc: Add to Home Screen or use Chrome’s install prompt. Cancel anytime and keep using the site in your browser.

dropZone.orClickBrowse: Tap or click to upload — browser or Turbo Cloud (size limits apply)
dropZone.uploadingHint: Validating your file — Turbo Cloud may use secure staging for large uploads.
dropZone.successSub: You can continue with the next step below.

account.title: My account
account.subtitle: Your PDFTrusted profile and sign-in settings.

loginPage.metaDesc: Sign in or create a PDFTrusted account with email. Secure access to your workspace.
loginPage.heroSubtitle: Use your email and password. New here? Create an account in seconds.
loginPage.forgotSubtitle: We will email you a secure link if an account exists for this address.
loginPage.forgotToastDesc: If an account exists for that email, you will receive a reset link shortly.
loginPage.signUpSuccess: Account created. You can sign in now.
loginPage.legalPrefix: By continuing you agree to our
loginPage.title: Login to PDFTrusted
loginPage.subtitle: Secure access to your premium tools, saved preferences, and processing history.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.apiUnreachable: Cannot reach the auth API on this origin. Run npm run dev from the project root (Next.js on :3000). For a remote API, set VITE_API_PROXY_TARGET to your deployed origin (e.g. https://pdftrusted.com).
errors.apiBadResponse: The auth API returned an unexpected response.

loginPage.resetMetaDesc: Choose a new password for your PDFTrusted account.
loginPage.resetSubtitle: Enter a strong password you have not used elsewhere.
loginPage.resetSuccess: Your password was updated. You can sign in now.
loginPage.resetMissingToken: This reset link is missing or invalid. Open the link from your email or request a new reset.
